query: SELECT c.id as consultor_id, c.name, c.email, c.role as consultor_role, c.managedProgramId, u.id as user_id, u.consultorId, u.programId, u.role as user_role FROM consultors c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.email = c.email WHERE c.role = 'gerente';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT c.id as consultor_id, c.name, c.email, c.role as consultor_role, c.managedProgramId, u.id as user_id, u.consultorId, u.programId, u.role as user_role FROM consultors c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.email = c.email WHERE c.role = 'gerente';
